title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pratham Education Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pratham Education Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education Capital India family as a Curriculum Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education Capital India:
Pratham Education Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education Capital India!
